extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the laptop lid is cracked.

image_assessments.notes: The image shows a tablet with a shattered screen, held by two hands.
The image shows a person closing a silver laptop, with no visible damage to the lid.

result.user_claim: Customer: The laptop lid is cracked. | Agent: Outer lid or display? | Customer: Lid area. | Agent: Is the screen also part of the claim? | Customer: No, this is my laptop lid claim.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed lid with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: The claimed issue (crack) is not visible. Images show 'glass_shatter' instead. Claim is contradicted by visual evidence.
